creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 225106
git diff for sysutils/savelogs

I already maintain scripts for arbitrary log
output I generate. But why bother maintaining
my own when somebody else is willing to do it.
I'm gonna use this port, and see it just hit
the pile. So I'm going to maintain it.

Changes
Makefile (MAINTAINER)

That's it && thanks! :-)

--Chris
